staticPropertyUsedBeforeInitInBaseClass.ts(2,15): error TS2729: Property 'S' is used before its initialization.


==== staticPropertyUsedBeforeInitInBaseClass.ts (1 errors) ====
    class Base {
      p = Derived.S;
                  ~
!!! error TS2729: Property 'S' is used before its initialization.
!!! related TS2728 staticPropertyUsedBeforeInitInBaseClass.ts:5:10: 'S' is declared here.
    }
    class Derived extends Base {
      static S = 1;
    }
